last_cycle.reason: Verifier passed with documentation nit only. N-way concurrency refactor correct, atomic transaction locking in place, type-check clean. Port-3000 e2e couldn't be run because of unrelated Docker container — regression task will use a free port.

Verifier passed. All 3 env-driven tunables correctly applied (CROSS_VAL_PROB=0.10, PDF_RASTER_SCALE=1.6, JSON no-indent at 2 sites). Critical invariants preserved (under 15 words, CRITICAL JSON, double-escape, pageNumbers). Token savings ~13-15% on full system prompt (slightly less than 20-30% headline but still meaningful). Pre-existing tsc errors in analytics route confirmed unrelated.

message_to_user: Accepting both implementation tracks. The regression task — which restarts the dev server, re-runs the 9 baseline submissions, and measures timing — will be unblocked automatically. I've already verified port 3000 is occupied by an unrelated Docker container, so I'll steer the regression task to use port 3001 instead of 3000.
